description.content:
Creates a new insurance claim with incident details, policy reference,
and initial damage assessment. Triggers automated triage and routing.

**Business Rules:**
- Policy must be active and in good standing
- Claim must be filed within 90 days of incident date
- One claim per incident per policy (duplicates rejected)
Returns paginated claims with optional filtering by status, line of business, or date range.
(This can only be one of auto,property,liability,workers_comp)
(This can only be one of auto,property,liability,workers_comp)

Records the adjudication decision for a claim. Can be an automated
decision from the rules engine or a manual decision from an adjuster.
Initiates payment processing for an approved claim.

response.name: No settlement found for this claim

info.name: Insurance Platform API - Claims Processing Service

description.content:
API for managing insurance claims from initial filing through adjudication
and settlement. Handles property, auto, and liability claims across
multiple lines of business.

**Authentication:**
- External integrations: OAuth 2.0 (Bearer token)
- Internal services: API key (X-API-Key header)

**Rate Limits:**
- Standard: 150 requests/minute
- File upload: 20 requests/minute

**Note:** This service runs on a mixed Lambda/ECS infrastructure and uses
GitLab CI for deployments. CI/CD integration patterns differ from the
Payments and Lending domains which use GitHub Actions.


Contact Support:
 Name: Insurance Engineering Team
 Email: insurance-engineering@example.com
